brand.name: Ember & Bun
brand.tagline: Fire-grilled burgers, honest ingredients, late-night energy.

hero.title: Fire makes it better.
hero.description: Smash burgers built with brisket, toasted buns, house sauces, and the confidence of an open flame.
hero.imageAlt: Ember and Bun double smash burger with molten cheddar and caramelized onions

signature.title: The House Stack
signature.description: Two brisket smash patties, smoked cheddar, applewood bacon, grilled onions, pickles, and Ember sauce on a toasted brioche bun.
signature.imageAlt: Double cheeseburger served with crisp fries

dishes.title: Bold by nature
dishes.description: Smoke, crunch, heat, and a sweet finish. These are the plates regulars come back for.

items.name: Smokehouse Double
items.description: Brisket patties, smoked cheddar, bacon jam.

items.name: Hot Honey Chicken
items.description: Crispy chicken, pickles, slaw, hot honey.

menu.title: From the grill
menu.description: A focused menu designed for fast decisions and serious cravings.

items.name: The House Stack
items.description: Double brisket, cheddar, bacon, Ember sauce.

items.name: Black Pepper Classic
items.description: Single patty, American cheese, onion, pickles.

items.name: Fireline Melt
items.description: Double patty, pepper jack, jalapeño, hot relish.

story.title: Made to share
story.description: Ember & Bun began with a late-night grill, a borrowed prep table, and a promise to make every burger worth the mess. We still grind our brisket daily and toast every bun to order.
story.imageAlt: Chef cooking over a bright open grill

gallery.title: From our grill
gallery.description: Burgers, late nights, and the people who make the room feel alive.

items.quote: The char on the patties is perfect. Every bite tastes deliberate.
items.name: Jordan Mercer

items.quote: Fast enough for lunch, good enough to plan dinner around.
items.name: Taylor Reed

items.quote: That house sauce and the crispy onion hay are a dangerous combination.
items.name: Mina Alvarez

contact.title: Skip the line. Meet us at the fire.
contact.description: Order ahead for pickup or pull up a chair. We save a few tables for walk-ins every night.

footer.note: Fire-grilled burgers made with brisket, sharp edges, and generous hospitality.
